title: narcissus bulbocodium var. albicans
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. albicans, also known as the white poet's narcissus or white bulbocodium, is a type of bulbous perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and sweet fragrance. Traditionally, Narcissus bulbocodium var. albicans has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Narcissus bulbocodium var. albicans typically involve drying the bulbs and flowers, and then using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness their medicinal properties.
